Hi, I'm

Deepshika Mekala

My path into software development wasn't a straight line — it was a series of curious detours that made me a better developer. From engineering fundamentals in Hyderabad to building cloud-powered applications in Canada, I've grown by jumping in headfirst. I write code with purpose, ship with intention, and learn something new every single day.
